page_content:
PLSC489 Special Topics in Plant Science (1-3 Credits)

A lecture and or laboratory series organized to study a selected phase of Plant Science not covered by existing courses. Credit according to time scheduled and organization of the course.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

PLSC601 Plant Genomics (3 Credits)

An advanced course in plant genomics which is the study of genes

of plant chromosomes. It will cover current topics in gene mapping, molecular markers, QTLs, gene sequencing, and genetic engineering with special focus on agriculturally important traits.

Credit Only Granted for. AGRO601, NRSC601, or PLSC601.
